name: Realms of runeterra RPG
description:
The Realms of runeterra laid out before you, an adventure waiting to be embarked on!

I didn't find anyone making this so made it myself ! this bot is HEAVELY based off the orginal book League of Legends-Realms of runeterra, made it for me or anyone who likes Realms of runeterra as much as I do!

this bot is not perfect, If it mixes regions up, or speak for you, just shuffle the message and it will do!

I know this isn't necessary but please don't argue in the comment, the world is beautiful for our differences, allow others to have their own opinions please! but don't straight up cussing, it's never right to do so.

update: The traditional Demacian game King's Gambit is added, more detailed description on Winter's claw in Freljord, The Avarosa tribe led by Ashe is added
creator: nuopii
